rationale: Optional future effective date capped at 60 days post-filing per 13-B MRSA.

(surviving corporation) — corp-name underline next to DATED
rationale: Right-side blank labeled '(surviving corporation)' on the DATED row. Likely re-states the surviving corp's name to confirm the signature is for that party.

DATED (merged corporation signature block)
rationale: Inset clerk-certification block: re-states the corporation name. Required when vote_method is a member-vote variant (options 1-3); not required for option 4 (board-of-directors vote with no members).

label_verbatim: (merged corporation)
rationale: Inset clerk-certification signer (clerk / secretary / assistant secretary). Required when member-vote variant is selected.

label_verbatim: *By (signature) / (type or print name and capacity) - signer 1
rationale: Date the merged corp signed. CAVEAT: this template appears incomplete — the merged-corp signature block has only widgets '36' and '37', missing parallel widgets for corp-name underline, signer 2, and clerk-cert (compare to surviving corp's '30'-'35').

label_verbatim: *By (signature) / (type or print name and capacity) - signer 2
rationale: Merged corp signer 1. CAVEAT: signer 2, corp-name underline, and clerk-certification widgets are MISSING from the AcroForm on this template (likely a 2006-revision template bug; visually they exist on the page but have no /T).
